channel.title: Menuverso — Barcelona Restaurant Database
channel.description: 1,504 Barcelona restaurants with menú del día tracking. Updated daily.

item.title: Casa Jaime
item.description: Spanish in Eixample. 14€ menú del día. ⭐ 4.5/5. Status: Confirmed. Three-course menu with drink and bread. Arroz a la marinera, cod, tiramisu.

item.title: La Flauta
item.description: Mediterranean in Eixample. 15-18€ menú del día. ⭐ 3.9/5. Status: Confirmed. Two locations. Tapas and seafood specialist. Menú del día not confirmed online.

item.title: Vivant
item.description: Mediterranean in Eixample. 18.90€ menú del día. ⭐ 4.4/5. Status: Confirmed. Spanish and Italian classics. Three-course meal with drink and bread.

item.description: Peruvian in Eixample. 16.90€ menú del día. ⭐ 4.3/5. Status: Confirmed. Peruvian. Complete weekly menu including ceviche. Chicken, fish, or vegan options.
